en: the time of year when a place is most busy with visitors and prices are highest
not because you want to, but because you are forced to
to tease someone by telling them something untrue as a joke
to come from a particular place originally
feeling like doing or having something
to not include someone or something
served separately from the main dish
to add up the price of items being purchased, especially at a store
to drive a vehicle to the side of the road or into a space and stop
to refuse to answer a question, especially in court, in order to avoid self-incrimination
to belong to a particular group or category
used to describe something bad that seems very likely to happen soon
to start working for the first time
